title: ARIN
helpOutput:
Usage: arin [<options>] <ip>

  Look up IP address information from ARIN.

Options:
  --json               Output results in JSON format
  -s, --server=<text>  DNS server to query (default: system resolver)
  -t, --timeout=<int>  Query timeout in seconds
  -h, --help           Show this message and exit

Arguments:
  <ip>  IP address to look up
output:
{
  "IP": "8.8.8.8",
  "Network Name": "GOGL",
  "Handle": "NET-8-8-8-0-2",
  "CIDR": "8.8.8.0/24",
  "Start Address": "8.8.8.0",
  "End Address": "8.8.8.255",
  "IP Version": "v4",
  "Type": "DIRECT ALLOCATION",
  "Organization (registrant)": "Google LLC",
  "Last changed": "2023-12-28T17:24:56-05:00",
  "Registration": "2023-12-28T17:24:33-05:00"
}
